TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Alolong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Guangfu, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 58 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Alolong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga Kalotong. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga Fahol. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč aloloŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu …£uaŇč*u, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a kalotoŇč. taj Ēzil na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a *ańßol. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
S.FORM: alang Alolong ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Guangfu, kwara sali buwan nya ga 18 buwan, 58 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 53 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 5 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 90%, binah lihuyan s'uli 2%. maki qu ngasal bziran. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Alolong hya' ga rgyax. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Alolong hya' ga Kalotong. tay 'zil na Alolong hya' ga Fahol. rekisi kayal kyokay maki 1 kyokay. ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŇč aloloŇč …£a nija mki s~…ēku kariŇč keŇč atu …£uaŇč*u, kwara s~…ēali ő≤uwan nja …£a ** ő≤uwan, ** ńßi ku kwara s~…ē Ēuli tajan. s~…ē Ēuli tajan pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a **% kjan ku ** ńßi, ő≤inańß …£a, Ējat kańßun s~…ēku pins~…ēpŇčan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a *% kjan ku * ńßi nja. pins~…ēpuŇč na linńßujan …£jen ¶~ ®umin …£a, amis~…ē **%, ő≤inańß lińßujan s~…ē Ēuli *%. maki qu Ňčas~…ēal ő≤ziran. rńßzjal kki Ēan taj Ēllaw na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a r…£jax. taj Ēzil na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkjańßu Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a lljuŇč. taj mkraja Ē na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a kalotoŇč. taj Ēzil na aloloŇč ńßja Ē …£a *ańßol. rekis~…ēi kajal kjokaj maki * kjokaj. s~…ēs~…ēquliq pinlp…£an ppqő≤aqan pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē ¶~ ®ikuj pqwas~…ēan ő≤iru Ēlaqi Ē mrkjas~…ē tuqi Ēs~…ēan ő≤as~…ēu kis~…ēja Ē …£l…£an s~…ēpjaŇčan na pinő≤ańßu uő≤uj qqmajńß
